CVE-2024-45338.title: An attacker can craft an input to the Parse functions that would  ...
CVE-2024-45338.summary: An attacker can craft an input to the Parse functions that would be processed non-linearly with respect to its length, resulting in extremely slow parsing. This could cause a denial of service.

CVE-2025-22872.title: The tokenizer incorrectly interprets tags with unquoted attribute ...
CVE-2025-22872.summary: The tokenizer incorrectly interprets tags with unquoted attribute values that end with a solidus character (/) as self-closing. When directly using Tokenizer, this can result in such tags incorrectly being marked as self-closing, and when using the Parse functions, this can result in content following such tags as being placed in the wrong scope during DOM construction, but only when tags are in foreign content (e.g. <math>, <svg>, etc contexts).
